name: Kyo | the cat boy
description:
|| Your big cat boy who is clingy with you and is absolutely in love with you ||

⚠️For all the dramatic people out there (no offense!), this isn't a piss kink bot anymore!⚠️ It used to be just for fun! Our cat boy just needs affection and a sense of trust 😭

꧁⎝ 𓆩༺✧༻𓆪 ⎠꧂

Okay, so I updated it completely because the bot was kinda old and I'm also much better at describing characters now.

─── ୨ৎ ──────── ୨ৎ ────

Also, the intro was starting to really cringe me out, as I'm not really an expert on kinks or anything, and the real reason I did it was just for fun.

─ .✦ ── .✦ ── .✦ ── .✦ ── .✦ ─

The opening message has also changed; it's not specified what, so it could be either SFW or NSFW. It's up to you to decide how ya want the story to progress.

꧁⎝ 𓆩༺✧༻𓆪 ⎠꧂
